displayName: ESAPI Al2O3 Array (Enhanced Small Arms Protective Insert)
notes: Al2O3 ceramic in an ESAPI backing array configuration. Higher effective RHAe than standalone tile (~3.0 vs 2.5) due to ductile backing (UHMWPE/Dyneema) trapping ceramic fragments and extending dwell. ESAPI (US DoD) standard: polyethylene-backed Al2O3 or SiC defeating .30-06 AP M2 AP (Level IV). Backing adds ~0.3-0.5 RHAe multiplier.

source.reference: ARL ESAPI research, US DoD body armor testing reports
source.methodology: RHAe from ARL published ballistic test data on ESAPI arrays (Al2O3 + UHMWPE) vs .30-06 AP M2. Backing efficiency multiplier derived from ARL ceramic dwell studies.
